```{r}
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
#| label: setup
#| cache: false

```

# Preface {.unnumbered}

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
{{< include index-html.qmd >}}
:::

## About This Document

This document was generated using Quarto CLI {{< version >}} [@Allaire2025] and contains analysis performed from {{< meta date >}}.

### Rendering Information

**Document system**: Quarto v{{< version >}}  
**Render date**: {{< meta date >}}  
**R version**: `r R.version.string` [@RCoreTeam2025]  
**Platform**: `r Sys.info()["sysname"]` `r Sys.info()["machine"]`  
**Last rendered**: `r format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z")`

### Document Layout and Style

This document employs the Tufte handout style, inspired by the statistician Edward Tufte's principles of effective data presentation[^ed]. Extensive margin space is used for annotations, side notes, cross-references etc., while the main narrative flows in the primary text column.

[^ed]: You can learn more about him on his [website](https://www.edwardtufte.com/)

{{< include intro.qmd >}}
